title: Storyboard · "Knock" — Radio→Animation production script · S9
body:
**Scene 9: 10:00–11:30 · Flashback · His Brother**

HERO FRAME: Interior of a 1949 hospital corridor · empty gurneys lined against the wall · fluorescent lights flickering · a single white coat hanging on a hook · a clipboard on the floor

MOTION: kling — one fluorescent light flickers and goes out at the end of the corridor. The white coat sways once as if from a closing door somewhere. A piece of paper drifts down from a noticeboard.

MOOD: Professional dedication, professional silence.

AUDIO: Walter: *"My brother was a doctor. He thought he could fight it. He worked in the hospital for three days after they all said to stop. I went to find him on the fourth day. He had left a note for me there too."*

source.label: Dimension X episode #05 (NBC Radio, May 6, 1950) adapting Fredric Brown's 1948 short-short story "Knock" (originally in *Thrilling Wonder Stories*, December 1948)

author: matt

witnesses.label: Rufinus of Aquileia, Commentary on the Apostles' Creed (c. AD 404)
Pirminius, De singulis libris canonicis scarapsus (c. AD 750) — earliest received form
Cited by every major catechism since 8th century
